info.title: Differ
info.description:
------
Diffs assemblies from different sources
Differ.exe <Old Assembly Provider> <New Assembly Provider> [Options]
Supported Assembly Providers:
assembly|<assembly path>
directory|<directory path>
nuget|<package id>|<version>|[framework version]
previous-nuget|<package id>|<version>|[framework version]
github|<owner>/<repo>|<commit>|<build command>|<relative output path>

options.name: --target
options.description:
the assembly targets. Defaults to *all* assemblies
located by the provider

options.name: --format
options.description:
the format of the diff output. Supported formats
are xml, markdown, asciidoc, github-comment.
Defaults to xml

options.name: --output
options.description:
the output directory or file name. If not
specified only prints to console

options.name: --prevent-change
options.description:
specified: none|patch|minor|major. Defaults to `
none` which will never fail.
